name: Okuma Corporation
summary: Okuma Corporation manufactures and sells machine tools, NC controllers, FA products, and servo motors in Japan, the United States, rest of the Americas, Europe, China, and the Asia Pacific. The company offers lathes, multitasking machines, machining centers, grinders, and IT/CNC products. It also provides automation products and after sales services, as well as solutions for die/mold industry. Okuma Corporation was founded in 1898 and is headquartered in Niwa-gun, Japan.
